title: cupressus chengiana subsp. kansouensis
intro: Cupressus chengiana subsp. kansouensis, also known as Chinese cypress, is a species of coniferous tree in the cypress family Cupressaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cupressus chengiana subsp. kansouensis include reducing fever, relieving cough, and soothing respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's essential oil is often extracted and used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its therapeutic properties.
